name: General Tso's Chicken II
recipeInstructions:
1. To make the sauce, mix cornstarch and water together in a bowl.
2. In a separate bowl, add minced garlic, ginger, sugar, soy sauce, vinegar, chicken broth, and MSG (if using). Stir until the sugar dissolves. Refrigerate until ready to use.
3. In another bowl, combine chicken pieces with soy sauce and white pepper. Beat in an egg. Gradually mix in cornstarch until the chicken is evenly coated.
4. Add salad oil to help separate the chicken pieces as they fry.
5. Divide the chicken into small batches and deep-fry at 350°F (175°C) until crispy. Drain on a paper towel.
6. Heat oil in a wok until hot. Add scallions and dried hot peppers, stirring briefly.
7. Stir in the sauce and add to the wok with the fried chicken. Cook until the sauce thickens.
8. Adjust consistency by adding more cornstarch or water if needed.
9. Serve over rice. Serves 6 - 8.
